channel.title: Our Company Website in Frontity (componentity.com)
channel.description:
In continuation of my works with Frontity, this time; **Our company website in Frontity.**
[https://componentity.com](https://componentity.com)
**Componentity** - Just copy & paste.
In componentity we build thousands of components for CSS frameworks, js frameworks, flutter, and other frameworks. Components are **ready to be copy-pasted into your applications ** and indeed, speedup design/development time with the extra benifit of having the most eye-catching components in their applications.
We have just started it and looking for coders who would love to join our team and build awesome components.
It is **opensource** so make sure to contribute and star :star: us on [Gitub] (https://github.com/Componentity/componentity-website).
Follow Our [CodePen Account](https://codepen.com/componentity) Star :star: Our [GitHub Account](https://github.com/componentity)
We are @componentity on [Twitter](https://twitter.com/componentity), [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/componentity), [Instagram](https://instagram.com/componentity), [Facebook](https://facebook.com/componentity), [CodePen](https://codepen.com/componentity) and [Github](https://github.com/componentity)
Previously I have developed an npm share package for Frontity and a Frontity theme.
Make sure to star me on GitHub
[https://github.com/mymakarim/frontity-share](https://github.com/mymakarim/frontity-share)
[https://www.npmjs.com/package/frontity-share](https://www.npmjs.com/package/frontity-share)

item.title: Our Company Website in Frontity (componentity.com)
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Thanks, Yahya. I just updated the original post.

Read full topic

item.title: Our Company Website in Frontity (componentity.com)
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Hi @mymakarim! Just wondering, shouldn’t the link to the GitHub repo point to this one instead: https://github.com/Componentity/componentity-website? Let me know.

Read full topic

item.title: Our Company Website in Frontity (componentity.com)
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Nice! Thank you for sharing it with the community, Yahya.

Read full topic

item.title: Our Company Website in Frontity (componentity.com)
item.dc:creator: mymakarim
item.description:
In continuation of my works with Frontity, this time; Our company website in Frontity.

https://componentity.com

Componentity - Just copy & paste.

In componentity we build thousands of components for CSS frameworks, js frameworks, flutter, and other frameworks. Components are **ready to be copy-pasted into your applications ** and indeed, speedup design/development time with the extra benifit of having the most eye-catching components in their applications.

We have just started it and looking for coders who would love to join our team and build awesome components.

It is opensource so make sure to contribute and star us on [Gitub] (https://github.com/Componentity/componentity-website).

Follow Our CodePen Account
Star Our GitHub Account

We are @componentity on Twitter, LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, CodePen and Github

Previously I have developed an npm share package for Frontity and a Frontity theme.

Make sure to star me on GitHub

https://github.com/mymakarim/frontity-share

https://www.npmjs.com/package/frontity-share

Read full topic
